title: Zozie Architecture Migration — Dashboard → Code-Controlled

actions_taken: Reconciled dashboard vs webhook configs — webhook is canonical on all dimensions

bugs_found.keyword_spaces: VAPI assistant-request API rejects transcriber keywords containing spaces. Dashboard UI tolerated 'cover letter:8' and 'job search:8' but the API validation requires single-word format. Fixed by removing spaces.
